title: Using the Action Center
description: Learn how to identify and resolve integration issues in the Action Center, including expired OAuth tokens, template sharing, and Drive folder access.

steps.narration: Sometimes AtlusDeck needs your help to resolve integration issues. Notice the action count indicator in the sidebar -- that means there are items that need your attention. Let's take a look at the Action Center.
The Action Center shows all issues that need your attention. Each item tells you exactly what's wrong and how to fix it.
This first item is an expired Google connection. When your OAuth token expires, AtlusDeck can't access your Drive or Slides. Click Re-authenticate to reconnect.
This item means a template hasn't been shared with the AtlusDeck service account. Copy the service account email and share the template in Google Drive.

callout.text: Share templates with the service account email

steps.narration: A Drive access issue means AtlusDeck can't reach your configured folder. Check that the folder still exists and permissions are correct.
Once you've resolved all issues, the Action Center shows a clean green checkmark. You're good to go!
Back on the dashboard, the action indicator is gone -- everything is running smoothly.
